name: Club 27 indoor golf
about: Club 27 is an indoor golf simulation venue in Beavercreek, Ohio, featuring 4 premium simulator bays equipped with the latest technology for accurate ball flight data and immersive course visuals. The facility operates on a pay-per-hour basis with no membership required, offering flexible time slots from 1 to 6 hours with 30-minute increments. Designed for both seasoned golfers and beginners, Club 27 provides a climate-controlled environment where players can perfect their swing year-round regardless of weather conditions. Each bay is fully equipped with professional-grade equipment, private access, and comfortable seating to ensure an optimal golfing experience.

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art technology with accurate ball flight data and immersive visuals

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own golf clubs as they are not provided by the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring food/drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned; BYOB policy not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes depends on player skill and simulator software, but sessions are booked in 1-6 hour increments with 30-minute additions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Club 27 welcomes families and is suitable for beginners, including juniors, with group-friendly bays accommodating up to 6 players.
